name: ros-cdk-foas

metadata.name: ros-cdk-foas
metadata.summary: Aliyun SDK Copyright (C) Alibaba Cloud Computing All rights reserved. http://www.aliyun.com

documentation:
## Aliyun ROS FOAS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as FOAS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-foas';
```

modules.name: ros_cdk_foas
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS FOAS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as FOAS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-foas';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_foas.Cluster

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.Cluster.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::FOAS::Cluster`, which is used to create a cluster for an order in exclusive mode.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosCluster\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-foas-cluster>

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ClusterProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Cluster`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-foas-cluster>

```
param cluster_name

Property clusterName: Cluster name. It begins with a letter, and contains only lowercase English letters, numbers, underscores (_), and is limited to 3-64 characters.

param description

Property description: Cluster description.

param oss_bucket

Property ossBucket: Bucket name in your OSS.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: VSwitch ID.

param order

Property order: Order detail. Only one of property Order or OrderId can be specified. Order is not suggested. Policy AliyunBSSFullAccess must be granted to StreamDefaultRole in RAM console. The order can not be cancelled.

param order_id

Property orderId: Order Id. Only one of property Order or OrderId can be specified. OrderId is suggested.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ClusterProps.cluster_name
documentation:
Property clusterName: Cluster name.

It begins with a letter, and contains only lowercase English letters, numbers, underscores (_), and is limited to 3-64 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ClusterProps.oss_bucket
documentation: Property ossBucket: Bucket name in your OSS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ClusterProps.order
documentation:
Property order: Order detail.

Only one of property Order or OrderId can be specified.
Order is not suggested.
Policy AliyunBSSFullAccess must be granted to StreamDefaultRole in RAM console.
The order can not be cancelled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ClusterProps.order_id
documentation:
Property orderId: Order Id.

Only one of property Order or OrderId can be specified.
OrderId is suggested.

classes.name: ros_cdk_foas.Project

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.Project.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::FOAS::Project`, which is used to create a project in a Realtime Compute cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosProject\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-foas-project>

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ProjectProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Project`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-foas-project>

```
param deploy_type

Property deployType: Cluster type: Exclusive cluster: cell Shared cluster: public.

param manager_ids

Property managerIds: Comma delimited account Id list of managers.

param name

Property name: Project name. It begins with a letter, and contains only lowercase English letters, numbers, underscores (_), and is limited to 3-64 characters.

param cluster_id

Property clusterId: Cluster ID.

param description

Property description: Project description.

param order_id

Property orderId: Order Id of Shared cluster.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ProjectProps.deploy_type
documentation: Property deployType: Cluster type: Exclusive cluster: cell Shared cluster: public.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ProjectProps.manager_ids
documentation: Property managerIds: Comma delimited account Id list of managers.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ProjectProps.name
documentation:
Property name: Project name.

It begins with a letter, and contains only lowercase English letters, numbers, underscores (_), and is limited to 3-64 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.ProjectProps.order_id
documentation: Property orderId: Order Id of Shared cluster.

classes.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.cluster_name
documentation: :Property: clusterName: Cluster name. It begins with a letter, and contains only lowercase English letters, numbers, underscores (_), and is limited to 3-64 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.oss_bucket
documentation: :Property: ossBucket: Bucket name in your OSS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.order
documentation:
:Property:

order: Order detail. Only one of property Order or OrderId can be specified.
Order is not suggested.
Policy AliyunBSSFullAccess must be granted to StreamDefaultRole in RAM console.
The order can not be cancelled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.order_id
documentation:
:Property:

orderId: Order Id. Only one of property Order or OrderId can be specified.
OrderId is suggested.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.OrderProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param master_number: true
param master_spec: true
param pay_model: true
param period: true
param slave_number: true
param slave_spec: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.OrderProperty.master_spec
documentation: :Property: masterSpec: Master spec, such as Ecs_4c16g.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.OrderProperty.slave_spec
documentation: :Property: slaveSpec: Master spec, such as Ecs_4c16g.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.OrderProperty.master_number
documentation: :Property: masterNumber: Number of masters. Valid values: 1, 3. Default to 3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.OrderProperty.pay_model
documentation: :Property: payModel: Pay model. Valid values: pre, post. Default to post.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.OrderProperty.period
documentation: :Property: period: Pre paid time period. Unit is month. Default to 1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_foas.RosCluster.OrderProperty.slave_number
documentation: :Property: slaveNumber: Number of masters. Valid values: 2-1000. Default to 2.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::FOAS::Cluster`, which is used to create a cluster for an order in exclusive mode.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Cluster` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-foas-cluster>
